response_constraints: Confirm the durable memory only after memory_add succeeds.
Mention only the stored key and value; do not expose unrelated memories.

arguments.value: step-free entrance and a seat near an exit

stages.purpose: Add the explicitly durable fact under a new key; the similarly named temporary memory is not a replacement.

state_assertions: memory["accessibility.event_access"] == "step-free entrance and a seat near an exit"

memory.accessibility.event_access.temporary: step-free entrance and a seat near an exit for the current request only

prompt: Save this as my ongoing event-access requirement: I need a step-free entrance and a seat near an exit.
